implementation_packet_lookup_by_packet_i.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_packets WHERE packet_id = %s::text LIMIT 1
implementation_packet_lookup_by_packet_i.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) * FROM decisioning.implementation_packets WHERE packet_id = ?

implementation_packets_list.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_packets WHERE (%s::integer = 0 OR status = %s::text) AND (%s::integer = 0 OR packet_type = %s::text) ORDER BY created_at DESC
implementation_packets_list.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_packets WHERE (? = 0 OR status = ?) AND (? = 0 OR packet_type = ?) ORDER BY created_at DESC

implementation_packet_items_list_by_pack.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_packet_items WHERE implementation_packet_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_packet_items_list_by_pack.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_packet_items WHERE implementation_packet_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

implementation_item_dependencies_list_by.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_item_dependencies WHERE implementation_packet_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_item_dependencies_list_by.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_item_dependencies WHERE implementation_packet_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

implementation_acceptance_checks_list_by.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_acceptance_checks WHERE implementation_packet_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_acceptance_checks_list_by.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_acceptance_checks WHERE implementation_packet_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

implementation_evidence_links_list_by_pa.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_evidence_links WHERE implementation_packet_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_evidence_links_list_by_pa.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_evidence_links WHERE implementation_packet_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

implementation_gate_bundles_list_by_pack.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_gate_bundles WHERE implementation_packet_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_gate_bundles_list_by_pack.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_gate_bundles WHERE implementation_packet_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

implementation_gate_decisions_list_by_pa.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_gate_decisions WHERE implementation_packet_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_gate_decisions_list_by_pa.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_gate_decisions WHERE implementation_packet_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

implementation_item_packet_lookup_detail.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_packet_items WHERE implementation_item_id = %s::uuid LIMIT 1
implementation_item_packet_lookup_detail.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) * FROM decisioning.implementation_packet_items WHERE implementation_item_id = ?

implementation_item_acceptance_checks_li.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_acceptance_checks WHERE implementation_item_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY sort_order ASC
implementation_item_acceptance_checks_li.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_acceptance_checks WHERE implementation_item_id = ? ORDER BY sort_order ASC

implementation_evidence_links_for_item.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_evidence_links WHERE implementation_item_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at ASC
implementation_evidence_links_for_item.sqlServerSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.implementation_evidence_links WHERE implementation_item_id = ? ORDER BY created_at ASC

workflow_run_latest_verification_result.postgresqlSql: SELECT * FROM decisioning.workflow_run_verification_results WHERE workflow_run_id = %s::uuid ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
workflow_run_latest_verification_result.sqlServerSql: SELECT TOP (1) * FROM decisioning.workflow_run_verification_results WHERE workflow_run_id = ? ORDER BY created_at DESC

create_implementation_packet.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_packets (implementation_packet_id, packet_id, packet_type, packet_version, title, status, system_slug, system_domain, parent_packet_id, root_packet_id, created_by_kind, created_by_name, imported_by, north_star_summary, scope_json, governance_json, lineage_json, completion_policy_json, source_payload_json) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb) RETURNING *
create_implementation_packet.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_packets (implementation_packet_id, packet_id, packet_type, packet_version, title, status, system_slug, system_domain, parent_packet_id, root_packet_id, created_by_kind, created_by_name, imported_by, north_star_summary, scope_json, governance_json, lineage_json, completion_policy_json, source_payload_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.* VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

create_implementation_packet_item.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_packet_items (implementation_item_id, implementation_packet_id, phase_key, phase_title, item_key, stable_item_key, item_type, priority, title, description, status, artifacts_expected_json, origin_domain, current_domain, target_domain, domain_status, routing_strategy, current_owner_type, current_owner_id, status_reason, updated_by) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::integer, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::jsonb, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text) RETURNING *
create_implementation_packet_item.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_packet_items (implementation_item_id, implementation_packet_id, phase_key, phase_title, item_key, stable_item_key, item_type, priority, title, description, status, artifacts_expected_json, origin_domain, current_domain, target_domain, domain_status, routing_strategy, current_owner_type, current_owner_id, status_reason, updated_by) OUTPUT INSERTED.* VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

create_implementation_acceptance_check.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_acceptance_checks (acceptance_check_id, implementation_item_id, sort_order, check_text, status) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::integer, %s::text, %s::text) RETURNING *
create_implementation_acceptance_check.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_acceptance_checks (acceptance_check_id, implementation_item_id, sort_order, check_text, status) OUTPUT INSERTED.* VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

create_implementation_item_dependency.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_item_dependencies (implementation_item_dependency_id, implementation_item_id, depends_on_item_key, depends_on_implementation_item_id) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::text, %s::uuid) RETURNING *
create_implementation_item_dependency.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_item_dependencies (implementation_item_dependency_id, implementation_item_id, depends_on_item_key, depends_on_implementation_item_id) OUTPUT INSERTED.* VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)

create_implementation_gate_bundle.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_gate_bundles (implementation_gate_bundle_id, implementation_packet_id, gate_type, status, summary_json, evidence_manifest_json) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::text, %s::text, %s::jsonb, %s::jsonb) RETURNING *
create_implementation_gate_bundle.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_gate_bundles (implementation_gate_bundle_id, implementation_packet_id, gate_type, status, summary_json, evidence_manifest_json) OUTPUT INSERTED.* VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

create_implementation_item_domain_transi.postgresqlSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_item_domain_transitions (implementation_item_domain_transition_id, implementation_item_id, implementation_packet_id, workflow_run_id, from_domain, to_domain, from_domain_status, to_domain_status, transition_reason, triggered_by, routing_strategy, current_owner_type, current_owner_id) VALUES (%s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::uuid, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text, %s::text) RETURNING *
create_implementation_item_domain_transi.sqlServerSql: INSERT INTO decisioning.implementation_item_domain_transitions (implementation_item_domain_transition_id, implementation_item_id, implementation_packet_id, workflow_run_id, from_domain, to_domain, from_domain_status, to_domain_status, transition_reason, triggered_by, routing_strategy, current_owner_type, current_owner_id) OUTPUT INSERTED.* VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
